_README: Make Scenario Blueprint — Phase 3: Daily Digest & Error Alerting. This is a separate scheduled scenario that runs once per day. It reads the master log, groups results by talent, and emails the supervisor a formatted summary.
_import_instructions: 1. Import this blueprint into Make as a new, standalone scenario.
2. Set the schedule trigger to run at 8:00 AM in the supervisor's timezone.
4. Confirm the supervisor email address before activating.
5. This scenario is independent — it does NOT need to be cloned per talent.
name: Phase 3 — Daily Digest & Alerts

parameters._time_comment: TODO: Confirm send time with supervisor. Recommended 8:00 AM. Set timezone in Make scenario settings.

parameters._spreadsheetId_comment: TODO: Fill in master log Google Sheet ID.

conditions._comment: Filters for all rows written in the last 24 hours.

parameters._limit_comment: Set high enough to capture a full day across all talent inboxes.

parameters.name: summary_stats
parameters._comment: Aggregates counts for the digest email subject line and body.

parameters.name: digest_html
parameters.value:
Daily Inbox Report — {{formatDate(now, 'MMMM D, YYYY')}}

{{3.summary_stats.total_processed}} emails processed across all talent inboxes in the last 24 hours.

Category Count
✅ Auto-Replied {{3.summary_stats.total_replied}}
🗑️ Archived as Trash {{3.summary_stats.total_trash}}
⚠️ Need Your Review {{3.summary_stats.total_uncertain}}
{{if(3.summary_stats.total_uncertain > 0, '

⚠️ Emails Requiring Manual Review

' + join(map(3.summary_stats.uncertain_rows, row => ''), '') + '
TalentFromSubjectOpen
' + row.`Talent Name` + '' + row.`Sender Email` + '' + row.Subject + 'Open in Gmail →
', '

✅ No emails need review today.

')}}

This report was generated automatically by the Talent Inbox Automation system. To adjust triage settings, update config/settings.json. To retrain the AI, update prompts/triage.md.
parameters._comment: Builds the HTML digest email. The uncertain emails section is conditionally rendered. Each uncertain email gets a one-click Gmail link.

parameters._connection_comment: TODO: Set this to the supervisor's Gmail connection in Make. Or use a generic SMTP module if preferred.
parameters._to_comment: TODO: Fill in the supervisor's email address. Comma-separate for multiple recipients.
parameters.subject: Daily Inbox Report — {{formatDate(now, 'MMMM D, YYYY')}} — {{3.summary_stats.total_processed}} emails processed, {{3.summary_stats.total_uncertain}} need review

metadata._zone_comment: TODO: Update to your Make workspace zone.

_error_alerting_note: TODO: Build a separate Make scenario for real-time error alerting. Set up Make's built-in 'Error Handler' on each Phase 1 scenario. When a scenario fails (e.g. OAuth expires, API down), it should trigger an HTTP module that calls a Make webhook connected to a simple scenario that sends an immediate email to the supervisor. Subject: 'ALERT: [TALENT_NAME] inbox automation failed — [ERROR_MESSAGE]'. This is separate from the daily digest.
_TODO_checklist: Confirm daily digest send time and supervisor timezone
Replace [MASTER_LOG_SHEET_ID] with master log Sheet ID
Set the Gmail connection to the supervisor's Gmail or a team inbox
Build the separate error alerting scenario (see _error_alerting_note above)
Run a 5-day supervised QA period — supervisor reviews 100% of outbound replies before going fully autonomous
After QA sign-off, remove or reduce the send delay in phase2_reply_scenario.json
